summary: Completed testing of 4 new features: Price History, Smart Reports, Employee Alerts, and Warehouse Selection in POS. All backend APIs (12 tests) passed. All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements and functionality.

passed_tests.details: Page loads with data-testid='price-history-page'. Shows 4 stats cards (Total Changes, Increases, Decreases, Average Change). Search input functional. Filter dropdown with options (All, Purchase Price, Wholesale Price, Retail Price). Empty state displayed correctly when no records.
Returns list of price change records with proper structure (id, product_id, product_name, old_price, new_price, price_type, change_percent). Filter by price_type works correctly.

Page loads with data-testid='smart-reports-page'. Has 3 tabs (Settings, History, Preview). Settings tab shows schedule section and content settings with toggle switches. Preview tab shows sales summary, low stock alerts, and AI tips. History tab shows empty state correctly.
Returns settings object with daily_report_enabled, daily_report_time, daily_report_recipients, include_ai_tips, include_sales_summary, include_low_stock_alerts, include_debt_reminders.
Returns report preview with sales summary (today_total, today_count, today_profit, change vs yesterday), low_stock items list, and ai_tips string.
Updates settings successfully and returns {success: true}.

Page loads with data-testid='employee-alerts-page'. Shows 3 stats cards (Total Employees, Employees with Limits, Active Alerts). Employees table displays correctly with settings button for each employee. Settings dialog opens with discount limit, debt limit, threshold sliders, and toggle switches.
Returns list of active alerts for employees approaching their limits. Properly structures alert data with type, severity, employee info, current_value, max_value, percent_used.
Returns alert settings for employee with enable_discount_alert, discount_threshold_percent, enable_debt_alert, debt_threshold_percent.
Returns list of warehouses with id, name, address, is_main fields.
Returns email configuration with enabled status.
New features are accessible via sidebar: Employee Alerts under 'إدارة الموظفين' (Employee Management) as 'تنبيهات الحدود' (Limit Alerts). Smart Reports and Price History accessible via direct URLs.

context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features fully tested and working: (1) Price History page at /price-history tracks product price changes with filtering and stats, (2) Smart Reports page at /smart-reports allows configuring daily automated reports with email delivery including AI tips, sales summary, low stock alerts, and debt reminders, (3) Employee Alerts page at /employee-alerts manages discount and debt limits for employees with configurable alert thresholds, (4) Warehouse selection available in POS when multiple warehouses exist. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing.

price_history_page.filter_dropdown: Select component with 4 price type options
price_history_page.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total changes, increases, decreases, avg change
price_history_page.table_or_empty_state: Table shows when records exist, empty state otherwise

smart_reports_page.schedule_settings: Daily report toggle, send time input, recipients input
smart_reports_page.content_settings: 4 toggle switches for AI tips, sales summary, low stock alerts, debt reminders
smart_reports_page.preview_section: Shows sales summary, low stock items, AI tips

employee_alerts_page.stats_cards: 3 cards - total employees, with limits, active alerts
employee_alerts_page.employees_table: Shows employee, position, discount limit, debt limit, status, actions
employee_alerts_page.settings_dialog: Inputs for limits, toggles for alerts, sliders for thresholds
